escalation.rationale: US strikes near Chabahar Free Trade Zone near Pakistan border while Iran continues Gulf attacks including Dubai airport disruption.

ticker_items: Iranian drone strikes Dubai airport, flights suspended temporarily
US jets hit military facility near Chabahar Free Trade Zone
Trump claims US has 'virtually unlimited' ammunition stocks
Iran maintains stranglehold on Strait of Hormuz shipping
Israel plans at least three more weeks of Iran operations

middle_east.description: US fighter jets struck military facility near Chabahar Free Trade Zone near Pakistan border.
Iranian drone hit fuel tank near Dubai airport causing fire and flight suspensions.
Israel launched fresh midnight strike on Dahiyeh targeting Hezbollah infrastructure.

ukraine.text: The Druzhba pipeline will stay closed as Ukraine hopes to punish Slovakia for desiring peace between Kiev and Moscow
ukraine.speaker: Robert Fico
ukraine.title: Slovak PM

middle_east.text: Iran does not hesitate to confront aggressors
middle_east.speaker: Masoud Pezeshkian
middle_east.title: Iranian President

middle_east.text: The Pentagon has virtually unlimited stocks of ammunition allowing the military to continue operations against Iran for as long as required
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: It would be very bad for the future of NATO if allies don't help secure the critical waterway for global oil shipping
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Germany ruled out naval participation in Strait of Hormuz escort mission despite Trump pressure on NATO allies. Berlin maintains defensive posture while avoiding direct involvement in maritime operations.

Macron bolsters military presence in Middle East calling effort strictly defensive while preparing for postwar talks. France positioning itself as mediator while maintaining regional military capability.
Starmer says UK working with allies on Strait of Hormuz plan after Trump call but insists UK won't be dragged into broader conflict. Britain balancing alliance obligations with domestic concerns.

financial.notes: Oil prices volatile as investors assess Kharg Island attack impact while gas prices up 25% since Iran war started.

update_log.text: US officials predict Iran war will end within weeks despite Tehran claiming it can outlast enemies
Iranian drone strikes fuel tank near Dubai airport forcing temporary flight suspensions
US fighter jets strike military facility near Chabahar Free Trade Zone near Pakistan border
Israel launches fresh midnight strike on Beirut southern suburbs targeting Hezbollah infrastructure
